'''Snogrutt''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]]<ref name="Gamorrean Ax">{{CCG|set=Jabba's Palace Limited|cardname=Gamorrean Ax}}</ref> and master weapon maker who was part of the [[Groogrun]] clan.<ref name="EGWT" /> Snogrutt was a minnow in the world of weapons manufacturing, and was known for producing some of the crudest [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-axs]] on the market.<ref name="FF14" /> One of the engineer's creations, the [[Clan Groogrun vibro-ax]], was proudly wielded by [[Ortugg]] and the other [[Jabba's Gamorrean guards|Gamorrean guards]] in service to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]<ref name="EGWT" /> in a display of stubborn cultural pride.<ref name="FF14" />
